description_long: This house features a rectangular, flat-roofed structure with a modern industrial aesthetic, characterized by large arched windows on the front facade and a clean, white exterior. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a paved driveway with two parked cars, as well as a small landscaped area with several leafy trees. The roof appears to have multiple skylights or rooftop access panels, and the windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern on all visible sides. The front entryway is defined by a prominent arched doorway flanked by two large arched windows, and there are three utility bins placed to the right of the entrance. The side and rear facades are simpler, with rectangular windows and minimal ornamentation. The overall design suggests a blend of residential and light commercial influences, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large arched windows, a paved driveway, and landscaped trees, enclosed by a low fence. The white exterior and regular window arrangement give it a clean, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, two large arched windows, driveway with two cars, utility bins, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows, flat roof with skylights, and the fence extending along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal features, showing the back of the house, part of the driveway, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more trees, the driveway, and a clear look at the side windows and fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent arched doorway with flanking arched windows, no porch, and utility bins to the side
